holdings.infoBox: QBER is an equity ETF with a total of 36 individual holdings.

overview.description: The TrueShares Quarterly Bear Hedge ETF (QBER) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is an actively managed ETF that aims for capital preservation in the event of decline in the US equity market space. The fund invests in short-term income generating debt securities and short-term put options of large-cap US securities. QBER was launched on Jun 28, 2024 and is issued by Truemark Group.
